case_title: MYRRHIA RESNECK et al VS. JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MYRRHIA RESNECK IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN LUCAS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS PRESENT. THE COURT REJECTS THE PLAINTIFF RESNECK'S REQUEST TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF CO-PLAINTIFF LUCAS. THE COURT DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN LUCAS' CASE AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, AND GOES FORWARD ON THE CASE OF PLAINTIFF RESNECK V JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2022 - JUDGMENT.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W1622817D002, TAG # 037017 BY DEFENDANT JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESNECK, MYRRHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $1,368.75 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,528.75, THE COURT DISMISSES WITHOUT PREJUDICE CASE BENJAMIN LUCAS VS. JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS TO PROCESS -REQUEST FORWARDED TO ACCT DEPT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RESNECK, MYRRHIA
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATIO TO APPEAR -MYRRHIA RESNECK TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF BENJAMIN LUCAS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCAS, BENJAMIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,737.50 FILED BY RESNECK, MYRRHIA LUCAS, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, [DEFENDANT MADE PAYMENT IN FULL & IN CASH] AS TO DEFENDANT JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00) SERVED NOV-30-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT JASON BORN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
